calendar.matters: Petition For Order: (1) Directing Martha L. Goring, As Trustee Of The Everton E. Goring Grantor Trust, To Execute Deed Transferring The Trusts Fifty Percent (50%) Interest In 631 - 2nd Avenue, San Francisco, California 94118 [Apn: 1642-008] To Trustee Of The Goring Living Trust 2016 Per July 23, 2019 Order; (2) Confirming Dispositive Provisions Of The Goring Living Trust 2016 And Its Subtrust 1; And, (3) Directing Martha L. Goring, As Trustee Of The Goring Living Trust 2016, To Make Distrib

Petition For Order Confriming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Martha Goring.

This matter was called at 9:23 a.m. The Court noted that it has objections and that Mr. Maloof is not present. Ms. Espey stated that she has not heard from Mr. Maloof, that she sent an e-mail to the group which includes Mr. Maloof when she found out that the matter was continued and that she never heard anything from him. Ms. Espey also read language from the Goring Trust/made reference to the declaration of trust, stated that this falls squarely under Heggstad, that William's Father died, and that he inherited that property, but he never administered the Father's trust. The Court overrules the objections and granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
